critique:
Step 1 is incorrect.
Using f_select_column(*) does not filter the table to the relevant columns required by the question. The function is meant to remove irrelevant columns based on the query, which here would be to retain at least "year" and "notes" to identify "uncredited appearance" entries and determine the earliest year. Selecting all columns fails to perform the intended narrowing and is a misuse of f_select_column.
